Now I can see the pattern more clearly:
1. The diamond now has a white cross inside it (rows 19-23, cols 37-41)
2. A light gray (w) path connects from the diamond down to the crosses below
3. The path goes from row 23 to row 57 or so
4. There's a purple cross with magenta center at rows 38-42, cols 32-35 (center at 40, 33)
5. There's a dark gray cross at rows 57-61, cols 25-29 (center at 59, 27)
The path seems to connect all these elements. Looking at the image, I see:
- Diamond with white cross at top
- Light gray path going down
- Purple cross with magenta center in the middle of the path
- More light gray path
- Dark gray cross at the bottom
I need to click the purple cross center at (40, 33) to activate it.
